summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 驅動的電力基礎設施需求激增，Quanta Services 第一季財報亮眼並上調全年展望，獲多家券商調升目標價。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Is Up 22.3% After Raising 2026 Outlook On Record Infrastructure Backlog
bullish.reason: 公司公布 2026 年第一季營收達 78.7 億美元，並因強勁的基礎設施積壓訂單而上調全年展望，直接推動股價大幅上漲。

bullish.title: UBS Maintains Buy on Quanta Services, Raises Price Target to $900
bullish.reason: 瑞銀 (UBS) 分析師 Steven Fisher 維持買入評級，並將目標價大幅調升至 900 美元，顯示市場對其長期成長潛力的高度信心。

bullish.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on Quanta Services, Raises Price Target to $826
bullish.reason: 高盛 (Goldman Sachs) 分析師 Atidrip Modak 同步調升目標價至 826 美元，反映出華爾街對該公司在能源轉型與 AI 基礎設施領域的領先地位給予高度評價。

bullish.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Quanta Services, Raises Price Target to $775
bullish.reason: TD Cowen 將目標價從 570 美元調升至 775 美元，進一步確認了市場對 Quanta Services 獲利成長動能的共識。

bullish.title: Quanta Stock Climbs 36% in a Month: Should You Buy Now or Wait?
bullish.reason: 股價單月飆升 36%，分析指出 AI 驅動的電力需求與創紀錄的積壓訂單是支撐長期成長的核心驅動力。

bullish.title: Looking for a Growth Stock? 3 Reasons Why Quanta Services (PWR) is a Solid Choice
bullish.reason: 強調 Quanta Services 具備強勁的成長屬性，預期將持續優於大盤表現。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on Quanta Services: “It’s Been Worth Owning”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 公開看好該公司在 AI 基礎設施建設中的關鍵角色。

bullish.title: The Smartest Energy Stocks to Buy With $1,000 Right Now
bullish.reason: 將 Quanta Services 列為受惠於能源需求激增的優質投資標的。
